name: Gunsen
description: Lacerate attackers with two razor sharp warfans.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: Lacerate attackers with two razor sharp warfans.

components.name: Nano Spores
components.description:
Fibrous technocyte tumour. Handle Infested tissue with caution.

Location: Saturn, Neptune, Eris, and Deimos

components.name: Oxium
components.description:
Oxium is a rare lighter than air alloy of Orokin origin, used in certain Corpus Robotics.

Location: Venus, Jupiter, Mars, Neptune, Pluto, Eris, Europa, and Lua.

components.name: Plastids
components.description:
A disgusting nanite-infested tissue mass.

Location: Phobos, Saturn, Uranus, Pluto, and Eris

components.name: Tellurium
components.description:
This rare metal is foreign to the Origin System and can only be found in asteroids that have made the long journey from other stars.

Location: Archwing Missions on Uranus

patchlogs.name: Update 29.5: Deimos Arcana
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Quassus and Gunsen gaining different Melee combo counters on first hit with the Slicing Feathers Stance. They will both have the same 3 combo counter hits now.

patchlogs.name: Derelict Shift: Update 28.3.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Gunsen not holstering properly.

patchlogs.name: Update 28: The Deadlock Protocol
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Gunsen not holstering properly in the Arsenal.

patchlogs.name: Shrine of the Eidolon: Update 22.14.0
patchlogs.changes: Fixed the Gunsen playing equip sounds during Combos.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Hotfix 22.8.2
patchlogs.changes: Removed the Magazine value from the Gunsen Mod section in the Arsenal.
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Gunsen spin attack sound and un-equip sound being audible for all players regardless of position.

patchlogs.name: Plains of Eidolon: Update 22.8.0 + Hotfix 22.8.0.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed using Gunsen's default attacks when using it without a stance.
